name: Cinnamon-Raisin Loaves w/ Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray a loaf pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, mix together flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and baking powder.
4. Add sugar, tomato soup, egg whites, vegetable oil, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
5. Stir in shredded zucchini and raisins.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the loaves to cool before serving.
